name: pavo
description: Manifest Anything: wrap Plaud CLI and MCP to control audio files, speaker identification, dictionaries, routing, and tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Control Plaud recordings beyond the stock app.
interface.longDescription: Pavo routes Codex to the local pavo CLI for Plaud CLI/MCP access, real-audio download, manifest inspection, speaker-aware transcription, custom dictionaries, routing, and task creation. The plugin is intentionally thin; the CLI/package remains the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Use Pavo to list my latest Plaud recordings.
Use Pavo to download and transcribe a Plaud recording.
Use Pavo doctor to check Plaud, local config, and transcription readiness.
